questions.q: In which language was the 2016 film 'Sairat' originally made?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' is a Marathi-language film.

questions.q: Who directed the 2016 Marathi film 'Sairat'?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' was directed by Nagraj Manjule.

questions.q: In which year was the Marathi film 'Sairat' released?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' was released in 2016.

questions.q: What is the central romantic theme that drives the story of the Marathi film 'Sairat'?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' depicts an inter-caste romance and its consequences.

questions.q: Which music composer duo created the soundtrack for the Marathi film 'Sairat'?
questions.explanation: The 'Sairat' soundtrack was composed by Ajay-Atul.

questions.q: The Marathi film 'Sairat' was notable for becoming the highest-grossing film in which industry at the time of its release?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' became the highest-grossing Marathi film at the time.

questions.q: The 2018 Hindi film 'Dhadak' was a remake of which Marathi film?
questions.explanation: The 2018 Hindi film 'Dhadak' was a remake of 'Sairat'.

questions.q: Which actress played the female lead Archana 'Archi' in the Marathi film 'Sairat'?
questions.explanation: Rinku Rajguru played Archi in 'Sairat'.

questions.q: Which actor played the male lead Prashant 'Parshya' in the Marathi film 'Sairat'?
questions.explanation: Akash Thosar played Parshya in 'Sairat'.

questions.q: What kind of ending does the Marathi film 'Sairat' have?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' ends tragically, underscoring the violence around its inter-caste romance.

questions.q: Before directing 'Sairat', Nagraj Manjule had directed which acclaimed 2013 Marathi film about caste?
questions.explanation: Nagraj Manjule directed 'Fandry' (2013) before 'Sairat'.

questions.q: Which popular song from the Marathi film 'Sairat' became a nationwide hit and is associated with the film's joyful romance?
questions.explanation: 'Zingaat' from 'Sairat' became a nationwide hit.

questions.q: For her performance in the Marathi film 'Sairat', Rinku Rajguru received which national honour?
options: A National Film Award for Best Actress
A National Film Award Special Mention
questions.explanation: Rinku Rajguru received a National Film Award Special Mention at the 63rd National Film Awards for 'Sairat'.

questions.q: The makers reported that the Marathi film 'Sairat' crossed which box-office milestone, a first for Marathi cinema at the time?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' was reported to have crossed the 100 crore mark, a first for Marathi cinema.

questions.q: In the 2018 Hindi remake 'Dhadak', which actress played the female lead corresponding to Archi from 'Sairat'?
questions.explanation: Janhvi Kapoor played the female lead in 'Dhadak', the Hindi remake of 'Sairat'.

questions.q: The recording of the orchestral songs for the Marathi film 'Sairat' by Ajay-Atul was notable for being done with which ensemble?
options: A traditional folk drum troupe only
questions.explanation: Ajay-Atul recorded the 'Sairat' songs with a live Hollywood symphony orchestra in Los Angeles.

questions.q: In which Indian state is the Marathi film 'Sairat' primarily set?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' is set in rural Maharashtra.

questions.q: Who was the cinematographer of the Marathi film 'Sairat', known for its striking rural visuals?
questions.explanation: Sudhakar Reddy Yakkanti was the cinematographer of 'Sairat'.

questions.q: What was notable about lead actors Rinku Rajguru and Akash Thosar at the time of the Marathi film 'Sairat'?
options: They were both debutants making their first film
They were both veteran Marathi theatre actors
They were a real-life married couple
questions.explanation: Both Rinku Rajguru and Akash Thosar made their film debut with 'Sairat'.

questions.q: The female lead Archi in the Marathi film 'Sairat' is portrayed as belonging to which kind of family relative to the hero?
questions.explanation: Archi belongs to a wealthier, upper-caste landowning family in 'Sairat'.

questions.q: The 2018 Hindi remake of 'Sairat', titled 'Dhadak', was directed by whom?
questions.explanation: 'Dhadak', the Hindi remake of 'Sairat', was directed by Shashank Khaitan.

questions.q: Which production banner backed the 2018 Hindi remake 'Dhadak', based on the Marathi film 'Sairat'?
questions.explanation: 'Dhadak', the remake of 'Sairat', was produced under Dharma Productions (with Zee Studios).

questions.q: In the 2018 Hindi remake 'Dhadak' of 'Sairat', which actor played the male lead opposite Janhvi Kapoor?
questions.explanation: Ishaan Khatter played the male lead opposite Janhvi Kapoor in 'Dhadak', the Hindi remake of 'Sairat'.

questions.q: Under which production banner, co-founded by Nagraj Manjule, was the Marathi film 'Sairat' associated for production and distribution along with Zee Studios?
questions.explanation: Nagraj Manjule's Aatpat Production was involved with 'Sairat', which was distributed by Zee Studios.

questions.q: Approximately how long is the Marathi film 'Sairat', notable for being lengthy for a romance of its kind?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' runs for roughly 174 minutes (about two hours and fifty-four minutes).

questions.q: The 'Sairat' song 'Yad Lagla' was sung by which playback singer who is also part of the composing duo?
questions.explanation: 'Yad Lagla' from 'Sairat' was sung by Ajay Gogavale of the Ajay-Atul duo.

questions.q: The Marathi film 'Sairat' had its world premiere at which 2016 international film festival?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' premiered in the Generation 14plus section at the 2016 Berlin International Film Festival (Berlinale).

questions.q: Beyond the Hindi 'Dhadak', the Marathi film 'Sairat' was also officially remade in several South Indian languages, including a 2017 Kannada version titled what?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' was remade in Kannada as 'Manasu Mallige' (2017).

questions.q: What does the Marathi word 'Sairat', the title of the 2016 film, broadly translate to in English?
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' roughly means 'wild' or 'uncontrolled', reflecting the untamed passion of the lovers.

questions.q: In what way did the climax of the Marathi film 'Sairat' make a strong social statement about its inter-caste couple?
options: They are killed in an honour-related murder
They are honoured by both families
questions.explanation: 'Sairat' ends with the couple being killed in an honour-related murder, highlighting caste violence.
